Apocalyptic Hex - ALL enemies cursed with multiple stacking hexes: -20 all stats, -20 all resists, Deadly Poison, -50% healing, 8-15 damage/tick Circle: 8 (50 mana)
Contagious Hex - Cursed target spreads hex to allies within 3 tiles (-10% attack speed, 3-5 damage/tick) Circle: 3 (9 mana)
Crippling Curse - -20 DEX, -30% movement speed, -20% attack speed Circle: 4 (11 mana)
Curse of Mortality - Target loses ALL regeneration (HP/Mana/Stam), -20 all resists, -15% max HP Circle: 6 (20 mana)
Curse of Undeath - Target becomes cursed undead: heals become damage, holy spells deal double damage, cannot naturally regenerate, +50% poison/curse damage taken Circle: 8 (50 mana)
Curse of the Hag - Target polymorphs into weak form (chicken), -90% damage, -50% movement, cannot cast spells Circle: 7 (40 mana)
Dark Pact - Sacrifice 15% current HP, gain +20% spell damage for duration Circle: 2 (6 mana)
Doomcurse - After 12 seconds, target takes massive damage (100-150) unless dispelled. Cannot be removed by normal means. Circle: 6 (20 mana)
Drain Essence - Drains 25-40 HP AND 10-20 mana, heals caster for HP amount and restores mana Circle: 4 (11 mana)
Enfeeble - -15 STR, -10% physical damage output Circle: 2 (6 mana)
Evil Eye - -5% accuracy Circle: 1 (4 mana)
Hex Storm - Zone pulses random hexes every 2s: curses, poisons, slows, silences Circle: 6 (20 mana)
Hexblade Ritual - Caster's spells deal bonus physical damage equal to 50% of spell damage, melee attacks apply hexes Circle: 7 (40 mana)
Hex of Agony - Whenever target is healed, they take equal damage instead Circle: 4 (11 mana)
Hex of Frailty - -10 to all resistances Circle: 3 (9 mana)
Hex of Silence - Target cannot cast spells (silenced) Circle: 5 (14 mana)
Life Leech - Drains 15-25 HP from target, heals caster for 150% of amount drained Circle: 3 (9 mana)
Mass Hex - All enemies cursed: -10 all stats, -10% damage, -5 all resists Circle: 5 (14 mana)
Necrotic Touch - Deals 25-40 damage, reduces healing received by 50% for 20 seconds, applies Deadly Poison Circle: 5 (14 mana)
Plague Bearer - Target takes 6-10 poison damage/tick and spreads poison to enemies within 2 tiles Circle: 4 (11 mana)
Plague of Sorrows - Contagious mega-plague: 10-18 damage/tick, spreads to anyone within 5 tiles, reduces healing 75% Circle: 7 (40 mana)
Poison Touch - Applies Greater Poison (5-8 damage/tick) Circle: 2 (6 mana)
Siphon Life - Drains 6-12 HP from target, heals caster for same amount Circle: 1 (4 mana)
Soul Harvest - Drains 40-65 HP from all enemies, heals caster for total amount drained, grants shield equal to healing Circle: 7 (40 mana)
Soul Siphon - Drains 35-55 HP, heals caster for 200% of amount, grants temporary +10% max HP buff (60s) Circle: 5 (14 mana)
Vampiric Aura - All damage dealt by caster heals caster for 40% of damage, +15% spell damage Circle: 6 (20 mana)
Voodoo Doll - Links to target - 25% of damage caster takes is reflected to linked target Circle: 3 (9 mana)
Voodoo Mastery - Controls target's actions (charm), can force them to attack allies or cast spells Circle: 8 (50 mana)
Wasting Curse - Target loses 1% max HP every 3 seconds (max 10% loss) Circle: 2 (6 mana)
Weak Curse - -5 to all stats (STR/DEX/INT) Circle: 1 (4 mana)

Witch Queen's Dominion - Become Witch Queen: All hexes cost 50% less mana, hexes last twice as long, life drain heals 300%, immune to curses/poison, summons 3 hex totems that auto-curse enemies Circle: 8 (50 mana)
Witch Sight - Reveals hidden creatures, see in darkness, detect magic auras Circle: 1 (4 mana)
Absolute Zero - Ultimate AoE nuke Massive cold damage in large area with freeze and frozen ground Circle: 7th (40 mana) Reagents: Arctic Pearl, Frozen Soul, EternalIce (Vystia reagents)
Ice Age - Screen-wide devastation Everything freezes across massive area Circle: 8th (50 mana) Reagents: Frozen Soul, EternalIce, HeartOfWinter, FrozenOre (Vystia reagents)

Avalanche - Cone AoE with knockback Massive ice and snow cascade dealing damage and knocking back enemies Circle: 6th (20 mana) Reagents: Permafrost Essence, Arctic Pearl, Frozen Soul (Vystia reagents)
Blizzard - AoE ice storm that deals damage over time and slows enemies Circle: 6th (20 mana) Area: 5 tile radius Duration: 10 seconds Reagents: MandrakeRoot, SulfurousAsh, Bloodmoss, SpidersSilk
Ice Bolt - Basic ice damage spell Deals cold damage and has chance to slow target Circle: 3rd (9 mana) Reagents: MandrakeRoot, SulfurousAsh
Chill Aura - Creates a chilling aura around caster Enemies within 2 tiles have reduced attack speed Circle: 1st (4 mana) Reagents: Winterleaf (Vystia reagent)
Cocytus Prison - Ultimate lockdown Imprisons target in unbreakable ice requiring channel Circle: 8th (50 mana) Reagents: Frozen Soul, EternalIce (3), HeartOfWinter (Vystia reagents)
Deep Freeze - Hard CC with vulnerability Freezes target solid making them take double damage Circle: 6th (20 mana) Reagents: Permafrost Essence, Arctic Pearl, Frozen Soul (Vystia reagents)
Eternal Winter - Zone control ultimate Creates massive frozen wasteland with continuous damage and slowing Circle: 7th (40 mana) Reagents: Arctic Pearl, Frozen Soul, EternalIce (Vystia reagents)

Fimbulwinter's Wrath - Transformation ultimate Caster becomes avatar of winter with massive power boost Circle: 7th (40 mana) Reagents: Arctic Pearl, Frozen Soul, EternalIce, HeartOfWinter (Vystia reagents)
Freezing Grasp - Improved cold damage with slow Deals cold damage and has higher chance to slow target Circle: 2nd (6 mana) Reagents: Frostbloom, Winterleaf (Vystia reagents)
Frost Armor - Defensive buff that grants physical and cold resistance Circle: 4th (11 mana) Duration: 120-240 seconds (scales with Magery) Reagents: Garlic, Ginseng, MandrakeRoot
Frost Meteor - Devastating AoE nuke Calls down massive ice meteor with enormous damage and frozen terrain Circle: 8th (50 mana) Reagents: Frozen Soul, EternalIce, HeartOfWinter (Vystia reagents)
Frost Slick - Creates icy ground that slows enemies Creates a 3x3 tile area of ice that slows enemies passing through Circle: 2nd (6 mana) Reagents: Frostbloom, Winterleaf (Vystia reagents)
Frost Touch - Basic ice touch attack Deals cold damage on touch and has chance to slow target Circle: 1st (4 mana) Reagents: Frostbloom, Winterleaf (Vystia reagents)
Frost Ward - Basic cold protection buff Grants +5 Cold Resistance for 30 seconds Circle: 1st (4 mana) Reagents: Winterleaf, Frostbloom (Vystia reagents)
Frostbite - Damage over time with anti-healing debuff Deals cold DoT and reduces healing received Circle: 3rd (9 mana) Reagents: Winterleaf, Glacier Crystal (Vystia reagents)

Frozen Ground - Creates frozen terrain that damages and slows Creates a 4-tile radius area that deals DoT and applies slow Circle: 3rd (9 mana) Reagents: Frostbloom, Winterleaf, Glacier Crystal (Vystia reagents)
Frozen Tomb - Ice prison that protects target Encases target in ice making them immune to damage but unable to act Circle: 5th (14 mana) Reagents: Permafrost Essence, Arctic Pearl (Vystia reagents)

Glacial Fortress - Ultimate defense buff Creates ice fortress with massive resistances and damage reflection Circle: 6th (20 mana) Reagents: Permafrost Essence, Arctic Pearl, Frozen Soul (Vystia reagents)
Glacial Mend - Ice-themed healing spell Heals target and grants cold resistance buff Circle: 2nd (6 mana) Reagents: Winterleaf, Frostbloom (Vystia reagents)
Glacial Strike - High damage with freeze chance Deals heavy cold damage with 50% chance to stun Circle: 5th (14 mana) Reagents: Permafrost Essence, Arctic Pearl (Vystia reagents)
Glacier Summon - Summons Ice Elemental Summons a powerful ice elemental to fight for the caster Circle: 7th (40 mana) Reagents: Arctic Pearl, Frozen Soul, Permafrost Essence (Vystia reagents)
Hypothermia - Severe debuff Reduces max HP, movement speed, and attack speed Circle: 5th (14 mana) Reagents: Permafrost Essence, Arctic Pearl (Vystia reagents)
Icicle Barrage - AoE burst damage Rains icicles in an area dealing cold damage Circle: 4th (11 mana) Reagents: Glacier Crystal, Permafrost Essence (Vystia reagents)
Permafrost - Root spell that prevents movement Roots target in place and deals DoT Circle: 4th (11 mana) Reagents: Winterleaf, Glacier Crystal, Permafrost Essence (Vystia reagents)
Rime Reaper - Execute ability Massive ice scythe that shatters low HP targets Circle: 8th (50 mana) Reagents: Frozen Soul, EternalIce, HeartOfWinter (Vystia reagents)
Ice Shard - Basic ice projectile attack Deals cold damage at range Circle: 1st (4 mana) Reagents: Frostbloom (Vystia reagent)
Shatter - Combo spell with bonus vs slowed/frozen Deals cold damage with +50% bonus if target is slowed or frozen Circle: 5th (14 mana) Reagents: Permafrost Essence, Glacier Crystal (Vystia reagents)
Ice Shield - Defensive buff with damage reflection Grants physical and cold resistance, reflects melee damage Circle: 2nd (6 mana) Reagents: Winterleaf, Glacier Crystal (Vystia reagents)

Ice Spear - Piercing ice projectile that hits multiple targets Deals heavy cold damage and can pierce through up to 3 enemies in a line Circle: 3rd (9 mana) Reagents: Frostbloom, Winterleaf, Glacier Crystal (Vystia reagents)
Ice Wall - Creates a barrier of ice Creates a 5-tile long wall that blocks movement Circle: 4th (11 mana) Reagents: Glacier Crystal, Permafrost Essence (Vystia reagents)

Avatar of the Forest - Become nature incarnate: Can shapeshift instantly and maintain spellcasting, all nature spells cost 50% less mana, immune to poison/fire, +40 all resists, summons 3 treant guardians Circle: 8 (50 mana)
Barkskin - +5 Physical Resistance, +5 Poison Resistance Circle: 1 (4 mana)
Bear Form (Lesser Shapeshift) - Transform into bear: +30 STR, +15 Physical Resist, melee attacks deal bonus damage, CANNOT CAST SPELLS Circle: 3 (9 mana)
Detect Life - Reveals hidden creatures within 12 tiles, shows HP bars Circle: 1 (4 mana)
Earthquake - Deals 20-35 physical damage, knocks down enemies (stun 2s), destroys ice walls/barriers Circle: 5 (14 mana)
Entangle - Roots target in place (cannot move, can still cast/attack) Circle: 2 (6 mana)
Force of Nature - Shapeshifts rapidly between all forms (changes every 5s), gains all benefits simultaneously, can still cast spells Circle: 7 (40 mana)
Greater Regeneration - Heals 8-12 HP/tick (15 ticks = 120-180 total) Circle: 5 (14 mana)
Hawk Form (Aerial Shapeshift) - Transform into hawk: Can fly over obstacles, +40 DEX, -50% damage taken from ranged, weak melee, CANNOT CAST SPELLS Circle: 5 (14 mana)
Healing Grove - Allies in area heal 5-8 HP/tick Circle: 4 (11 mana)
Hydra Form (Legendary Shapeshift) - Transform into multi-headed hydra: +70 STR, +30 DEX, triple attack, regenerates 15 HP/tick, immune to poison, CANNOT CAST SPELLS Circle: 8 (50 mana)
Living Fortress - +20 Physical Resist, +20 Poison Resist, +15% max HP, immune to roots/slows, heals 5 HP/tick Circle: 6 (20 mana)
Nature's Blessing - +10% max HP, +5 HP regen/tick, +10 Poison Resist Circle: 3 (9 mana)
Nature's Touch - Heals 8-15 HP Circle: 1 (4 mana)
Nature's Wrath - Deals 35-55 damage (mix of poison/physical), applies poison DoT, roots all targets Circle: 6 (20 mana)
Plague - Devastating poison DoT (10-15 damage/tick), spreads to nearby enemies within 3 tiles Circle: 7 (40 mana)
Poison Spores - DoT dealing 3-5 poison damage/tick (6 ticks) Circle: 2 (6 mana)
Primordial Restoration - Massive AoE heal (80-120 HP), removes all poisons/curses, grants immunity to debuffs for 15s Circle: 7 (40 mana)
Rejuvenation - Heals 3-6 HP/tick (10 ticks = 30-60 total) Circle: 2 (6 mana)
Spore Cloud - Poison cloud dealing 5-9 damage/tick, reduces visibility, -25% accuracy Circle: 5 (14 mana)
Strangling Vines - Target is rooted and takes 6-10 damage/tick, -20% attack speed Circle: 4 (11 mana)

Thorn Apocalypse - Thorns erupt from ground dealing 60-100 damage (50% poison, 50% physical), applies bleed and poison DoTs, roots all enemies for 5s Circle: 8 (50 mana)
Thorn Dart - Deals 4-10 damage (50% poison, 50% physical) Circle: 1 (4 mana)
Thorn Volley - Deals 12-22 damage to all enemies in area (50% poison, 50% physical) Circle: 3 (9 mana)
Toxic Bloom - Explodes for 15-25 poison damage, applies poison DoT (5 damage/tick for 10s) Circle: 4 (11 mana)
Treant Form (Greater Shapeshift) - Transform into treant: +50 STR, +30 Physical Resist, +25% max HP, AoE root on attacks, CANNOT CAST SPELLS Circle: 6 (20 mana)
Wild Growth - Creates thick vegetation that blocks line of sight and slows enemies 30% Circle: 3 (9 mana)
